accepted.reason: Grid-indexed bbox insertion/query loops are strong standalone spatial-kernel examples.
Hue lookup-table generation and per-pixel masking provide deterministic image-kernel workloads.
Polymorphic integrand evaluation inside numeric integration loop is a clean optimization target.
Damped-sinc interpolation uses multiple nested loops and kernel normalization with strong Cython relevance.

skipped.reason: Pointer/refcount dictionary internals are low-level container plumbing, not ideal GRPO conversion content.
Domain-specific districting/state-object logic is tightly coupled to external project structures.
Model-specific optimization routine with broad matrix/weight assumptions, lower generality for current set.
Micro-benchmark function-call demo is too minimal compared with preferred kernel complexity.
GPU/OpenCL backend code is framework-specific and depends on specialized runtime kernels.
Permutation-search Euler implementation is niche and less representative than selected kernels.
